# Implement Feature

## Requirements

- Treat the approved plan as execution contract.
- Keep within scope and non-goals.
- Run required validation commands.
- Update listed docs in the same change.

## Output

- Tasks completed
- Validation run
- Documentation updated
- Deviations or blockers
